item.title: OpenAI's Engineering Lead Says AI Era Will Create Thousands Of Niche Startups: 'It's Hard For Me To Imagine...'
item.description: Sherwin Wu says AI will likely drive a surge in smaller startups, reshaping the startup and venture capital landscape. Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: Dan Ives Calls AI-Driven Software Selloff 'Most Disconnected Trade,' Says Salesforce And ServiceNow Are Historic Buys
